package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for bytes_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_len: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Manual `len` and slice suffix checks instead of `bytes.HasSuffix(...)`.
type CaseBytesHassuffixManualSliceAfterLenDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBytesHassuffixManualSliceAfterLenModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBytesHassuffixManualSliceAfterLenRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBytesHassuffixManualSliceAfterLenModel
}

type CaseBytesHassuffixManualSliceAfterLenService struct {
    repo *CaseBytesHassuffixManualSliceAfterLenRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBytesHassuffixManualSliceAfterLenAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBytesHassuffixManualSliceAfterLen(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBytesHassuffixManualSliceAfterLenDTO) error {
    focus := "bytes_hassuffix_manual_slice_after"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    _ = len(buf) >= 3 && string(buf[len(buf)-3:]) == "zip"
    var copied []CaseBytesHassuffixManualSliceAfterLenDTO
    for _, item := range items { copied = append(copied, item) }
    bytes_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_positive := map[string]int{"bytes": 1, "hassuffix": 2, "manual": 3, "slice": 4, "after": 5, "len": 6}
    bytes_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bytes_positive_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = bytes_positive_0
    hassuffix_positive_1 := bytes_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_positive["hassuffix"] + len(input)
    _ = hassuffix_positive_1
    manual_positive_2 := bytes_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_positive["manual"] + len(input)
    _ = manual_positive_2
    slice_positive_3 := bytes_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_positive["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_positive_3
    after_positive_4 := bytes_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_positive["after"] + len(input)
    _ = after_positive_4
    len_positive_5 := bytes_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_positive["len"] + len(input)
    _ = len_positive_5
    return nil
}
